channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bianca Censori seen in revealing outfit during Los Angeles night out with Kanye West
item.description: Bianca Censori, wife of musician Kanye West, was photographed during a night out in Los Angeles wearing a highly revealing outfit that attracted significant media attention. The couple were seen leavi...

item.title: Lady Louise Windsor’s emerging role and public image within the Royal Family
item.description: Lady Louise Windsor, daughter of Sophie, Duchess of Edinburgh, has been portrayed as increasingly establishing her own identity within the Royal Family after years of being described as a more isolate...

item.title: Heart Fit Clinic highlights early heart disease risk detection and advanced cardiac screening
item.description: This sponsored segment promotes Heart Fit Clinic, a cardiovascular health service featured on QR Calgary’s “Talk to the Experts” program. The content emphasises the importance of proactive heart healt...

item.title: Islamophobia and the normalisation of anti-Muslim prejudice in politics and media
item.description: The article argues that Islamophobia has become increasingly normalised across politics, media and public discourse worldwide, often operating subtly rather than through explicit hatred. Using coverag...

item.title: A Look Back at Betty Grable’s Hollywood Stardom and Iconic 1940s Portraits
item.description: The article revisits the career and cultural impact of Betty Grable, one of Hollywood’s most recognizable stars during the 1940s. Known as an actress, dancer, singer, model, and pin-up icon, Grable be...

item.title: FRSC deploys 1,889 officers for Eid-el-Kabir road safety patrol in Kano
item.description: The Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC) Kano State Sector Command has deployed a total of 1,889 personnel to ensure safety and smooth traffic flow during the 2026 Eid-el-Kabir celebrations. According to ...

item.title: How CREEM Magazine’s ‘Stars Cars’ Feature Captured Rock and Car Culture in the 1980s
item.description: The article looks back at CREEM Magazine’s well-known “Stars Cars” feature during the 1980s, a photo series that combined rock music culture with the automobile obsession deeply tied to Detroit, where...

item.title: Don Jazzy hints at searching for life partner in Uganda and Tanzania amid ongoing public interest
item.description: Famous Nigerian music producer and Mavin Records boss, Don Jazzy, has once again sparked wide online discussions after joking that his search for a life partner may extend beyond Nigeria into East Afr...

item.title: Editorial criticising alleged political theatrics and accountability issues in the Philippine Senate during high-profile legal controversies
item.description: This Rappler editorial examines what it describes as “political theatre” unfolding in the Philippine Senate amid high-profile legal and political controversies. It contrasts recent enforcement operati...

item.title: Marcos appoints Francis Tolentino as acting DOLE secretary amid Laguesma health concerns
item.description: Inanunsyo ng Malacañang na itinalaga ni Pangulong Ferdinand Marcos Jr. si dating senador Francis Tolentino bilang acting secretary ng Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE). Ayon kay Palace Press O...

item.title: Two seriously injured in Caledon collision; Highway 10 and McLaughlin Road closed
item.description: A serious collision in Caledon, Ontario, has left two people with significant injuries and led to the closure of a key intersection in the Peel Region. According to the report published on May 24, 202...

item.title: Portrait of Lilian Rose Goldstein, Alleged Member of the Forty Elephants Criminal Network in 1920s London

item.title: Questions Raised After Sh227 Million Compensation Meant for Rahman Mosque Beneficiaries Reportedly Paid to Wrong People
item.description: A controversy has emerged over the alleged misdirection of Sh227 million in compensation funds linked to Rahman Mosque in Kenya. According to reports, the money, which was supposed to reach legitimate...

item.title: Several Lagos Assembly Principal Officers Lose APC Tickets Ahead Of 2027 Elections
item.description: Several senior members of the Lagos State House of Assembly don lose their return tickets after the All Progressives Congress (APC) conducted primaries ahead of the 2027 elections. The development don...

item.title: Petrol and diesel prices rise again in Bengaluru after fourth increase in 10 days
item.description: Fuel prices in Bengaluru have seen a sharp and continuous rise, with petrol crossing the ₹110 per litre mark following the fourth increase in just 10 days. According to the latest revision, petrol pri...

item.title: Security overhaul ordered for President Ruto after breach during Kilifi public event
item.description: A major security review and overhaul has been ordered following a breach involving President William Ruto during a public event in Ganze, Kilifi County. The incident occurred during a thanksgiving cer...

item.title: How AI is transforming online shopping and reshaping how brands reach consumers
item.description: The article explores how artificial intelligence is reshaping the modern shopping experience, making it significantly faster, more seamless, and more personalised. According to Google Canada’s head of...

item.title: Anglican Communion tensions deepen over election of first female Archbishop of Canterbury
item.description: Barney Mthombothi reflects on the growing internal conflict within the worldwide Anglican Communion following the election of Sarah Mullally as the first woman Archbishop of Canterbury. The article ex...

item.title: Pandor home robbery reignites concerns over violent crime and public safety in South Africa
item.description: The robbery at the Pretoria home of former international relations minister Naledi Pandor has renewed public concern about violent crime and safety in South Africa. According to the article, Pandor an...

item.title: Family Struggles Over Whether Alcoholic Son Should Attend Grandfather’s Funeral
item.description: This advice column by R. Eric Thomas discusses a difficult family conflict that emerged after the death of a man who had suffered from dementia for many years. The deceased man’s daughter is strugglin...
